memory_entries.text: For jazzband/tablib repository tasks, the checkout path is /testbed (not /workspace).

In jazzband/tablib ODS exporter, src/tablib/formats/_ods.py creates OpenDocumentSpreadsheet in export_set/export_book and writes cells in ODSFormat.dset_sheet; ODS date/datetime/time cells currently set value-type/datevalue/timevalue but need table-cell styles in automaticstyles referring to data styles in document styles for immediate office display formatting.

In jazzband/tablib ODS format issue 7, src/tablib/formats/_ods.py should export datetime cells with datevalue (office:date-value) not value, export time cells as XML duration strings like PT14H30M0S in timevalue, and import both XML duration timevalue and legacy HH:MM:SS timevalue.

In jd/tenacity repository issue 13, retry_base composition with plain functions was fixed in /testbed/tenacity/retry.py by changing retry_base.__and__ to return retry_all(other, self) and __or__ to return retry_any(other, self), instead of delegating to other.__rand__/__ror__; tests/test_tenacity.py already contains plain-function composition regression tests.

In jd/tenacity issue 16, generator retry support: add _utils.is_generator_callable/is_async_generator_callable; BaseRetrying.wraps uses `for attempt in copy: with attempt: yield from f(...)` for sync generators; retry() routes async generators to AsyncRetrying; AsyncRetrying.wraps uses async generator wrapper with `async for attempt in copy` and `async for item in fn(...)`.
